headline_summary: US-Israeli air campaign against Iran entered day six with intensified strikes reported in Tehran
Iran threatened retaliation beyond the Gulf after the US said it sank an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka
Iranian state TV was hacked to air opposition figure Reza Pahlavi, highlighting intensifying information operations
Strait of Hormuz disruption risk remains central for energy prices, tanker availability, and war-risk insurance premia
US military signaled strikes will expand deeper inland in Iran as Iran’s missile launch tempo reportedly declines
risk_drivers: Escalatory US/Israel strike tempo and stated intent to expand targets inland
Iran retaliation threats against Americans globally
Persistent shipping/insurance disruption risk around the Strait of Hormuz
Domestic instability in Iran after the killing of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and uncertain succession

Energy: Upside skew to crude and refined products on Hormuz disruption and tanker insurance constraints (oil_up_risk)
Higher freight and war-risk premia for tankers/LNG cargoes; potential rationing effects for import-dependent Asia
FX: Risk-off episodes likely to support USD and safe-haven FX; pressure on EM/high-beta FX (em_fx_pressure, risk_off_flows)
Rates: Flight-to-quality can pull core yields lower; oil shock raises inflation-risk and credit spread sensitivity (rates_credit_spreads)
Equities: Higher energy and shipping costs weigh on transport/consumer cyclicals; defense/energy may outperform

sources.title: Bombing of Tehran intensifies as war enters day six
US says Iran firing fewer missiles, US strikes to expand inland

events.title: Vessel traffic through Strait of Hormuz nearly halted; ~300 tankers stranded
events.implication: Throughput shock for crude/LNG; war-risk premia and freight/insurance surge (oil_up_risk).

events.title: Blast damages Bahamas-flagged tanker Sonangol Namibe near Khor al Zubair port
events.location_resolved: Khor al-Zubair, Umm Qasr, Umm Qasr Subdistrict, Al-Zubair District, Basra Governorate, Iraq
events.implication: Highlights spillover of Gulf conflict into Iraqi export infrastructure; raises disruption risk.

events.title: Turkey says NATO air defences destroyed a ballistic missile fired from Iran headed into Turkish airspace; debris reported in Hatay area
events.location_resolved: Hatay Mutfağı, Termesos Bulvarı, Mehmetçik Mahallesi, Antalya, Muratpaşa, Antalya, Mediterranean Region, 07030, Turkey
events.implication: Potential widening to a NATO member raises escalation tail-risk and supports risk_off_flows and em_fx_pressure.

events.title: COSCO Shipping suspends new bookings for Middle East routes
events.implication: Booking suspensions reflect escalating operational constraints that can compound trade delays and freight inflation.

events.title: Rare tanker transit to load Murban crude via Strait of Hormuz amid shipping disruption (Pola to Jebel Dhanna)
events.location_resolved: Danat Resort Jebel Dhanna, As Saffar Street, Al Dhannah, Al Dhafrah Region, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
events.implication: Suggests partial/episodic navigation but under elevated operational risk; volatility in flows persists.

events.location_resolved: Tyre, Tyre District, South Governorate, 1601, Lebanon
events.implication: Lebanon theatre escalation broadens regional conflict footprint; increases risk-off flows and local operational disruption.

events.title: Israel orders evacuation across swathe of south Lebanon as hostilities with Hezbollah escalate

events.title: IRGC claims control of Strait of Hormuz; U.S. discusses potential naval escorts for tankers (as reported)

events.implication: Physical damage and crew evacuations increase risk premia and likely deter transits.

events.title: U.S. strike reported to hit Iranian warship far from Gulf amid widening conflict
events.implication: Signals escalation scope; increases tail risk of wider maritime confrontation and retaliation.

events.title: Qatar LNG shipments disrupted; force majeure declared amid reported attacks on facilities

events.title: Israeli strike reported hitting building in Baalbek amid Lebanon escalation

events.title: Strait of Hormuz vessel traffic sharply reduced; US discusses naval escorts for tankers

events.title: US embassy complex in Riyadh hit by drones, Saudi defence ministry says

events.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed and threatens ships attempting to transit
